# LearnHub — Online Courses Platform

## What is this?
LearnHub is a modern online learning platform offering 120+ expert-led courses across technology, design, business, and more. Students can browse courses, enroll, and advance their careers at their own pace.

## Key Features
- 120+ curated online courses
- Expert instructors across multiple disciplines
- Structured learning paths for career advancement
- Responsive web experience on all devices
- Course categories: technology, design, business, and more

## Target Audience
Students, professionals, and lifelong learners looking to upskill or switch careers.

## Technology
Built with React 18, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and Vite.

## Pages / Routes
- / — Homepage with hero, course overview, course grid, career CTA, and footer
- /#courses — Browse all available courses
- /#about — About LearnHub
- /#contact — Contact and social links

## Contact
Visit https://learnhub.app for more information.
